rules.title: Age Eligibility
rules.description: Any citizen who has attained the age of 18 years on the qualifying date is eligible to be registered.

rules.title: Identity Verification
rules.description: Voters must present an EPIC (Electors Photo Identity Card) or alternative approved ID.

rules.title: Superintendence
rules.description: The superintendence, direction, and control of elections are vested in the Election Commission.
